# Artifact Management

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| JFrog Artifactory | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Google Artifact Registry | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Azure Artifacts | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- Artifact lifecycle management and retention policies
- Secure artifact promotion workflows with policy gates
- Container image registries with vulnerability scanning
- Build artifact caching and dependency proxying
- Multi-format repository management (Docker, Maven, PyPI, generic)
